definitions.text: A motion of the limbs or body, especially one made to emphasize speech.
examples: The middle-finger gesture is really a nonverbal swear.

definitions.text: An act or a remark that serves as a formality or as a sign of attitude.
examples: We took flowers as a gesture of sympathy.

definitions.text: A motion made with a pointing device, or on a touchscreen, that is recognised by the system as a command.
examples: This Web browser can be controlled with mouse gestures.

definitions.text: To make a gesture or gestures.
examples: My dad told me never to gesture with my hands when I talk.
Never gesture at someone using your middle finger: it may be perceived as an insult.

definitions.text: To express (something) by a gesture or gestures.
To accompany or illustrate with gesture or action.
